creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Don’t make this Budapest mistake ❌

Budapest is one of my favourite cities in Europe, but it’s, in my opinion, a bit embarrassing for the city that their politicians haven’t cracked down on this tourist scam 😬

Have you been to Budapest? What did you think of the city? ✌️

#budapest #traveltips #budapesttravel

transcription.text: avoid this scam in Budapest. Budapest is still one of my favorite cities in Europe because it's just so extremely beautiful and it's also an affordable place to visit as a tourist. But there's one thing that you should never do in Budapest and it's something that I've heard so many people talk about in the comment section over on my travel blog. Now public transport in Budapest is great so you should always try and use that to get around but if you ever need to take a taxi never ever hail a taxi on the street if it says freelancer on the side of the car. These guys are out to scam you they won't ever use the meter and they're also known to become a bit threatening and even violent. Instead use a taxi app like Boat to make sure you're not getting ripped off.
